data.title: Hearts and Minds flags minor delay in director interest disclosure
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hearts and Minds Investments Ltd ( (AU:HM1) ) has issued an update.

Hearts and Minds Investments has disclosed a change in director Gary Weiss’s relevant interest following his receipt of 1,926 fully paid ordinary shares under the company’s dividend reinvestment plan on 16 April 2026. The additional allocation, held indirectly through superannuation and related entities, increases Weiss’s total holding to 507,846 shares.

The company acknowledged that it failed to lodge the required change of director’s interest notice within the prescribed five business days due to an administrative oversight. It characterised the delay as a non‑material, isolated incident and affirmed that its existing securities trading policy and directors’ awareness of their disclosure obligations remain adequate for compliance with ASX listing rules.

More about Hearts and Minds Investments Ltd

Hearts and Minds Investments Limited is an Australian listed investment company trading on the ASX under the ticker HM1. The company provides investors with exposure to a portfolio of listed securities and operates under ASX listing rules, maintaining a securities trading policy and governance framework for its directors and officers.

Average Trading Volume: 184,283

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Toubani Resources Sets May AGM and Pushes Digital Communications for Shareholders
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Toubani Resources Limited Registered Shs ( (AU:TRE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Toubani Resources Limited has scheduled its Annual General Meeting of shareholders for 28 May 2026 in Perth, providing investors with the opportunity to attend in person and participate in key governance decisions. The company will not mail physical copies of the Notice of Meeting, instead directing shareholders to access documents and submit proxy votes online or via mailed proxy forms, while strongly encouraging registration for electronic communications to reduce costs and improve the speed and efficiency of shareholder engagement.

Shareholders are being urged to lodge proxy votes by 26 May 2026 through the company’s share registry portal or by returning personalised forms, ensuring their votes are counted even if they cannot attend the meeting. By shifting toward digital distribution of meeting materials and encouraging electronic communications, Toubani aims to streamline investor relations, lower printing and mailing expenses, and align its practices with more sustainable and modern corporate communication standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TRE) stock is a Buy with a A$1.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Toubani Resources Limited Registered Shs stock, see the AU:TRE Stock Forecast page.

More about Toubani Resources Limited Registered Shs

Toubani Resources Limited (ASX:TRE) is an Australia-based resources company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange, with its head office in West Perth, Western Australia. The company maintains an active shareholder base and uses both physical meetings and electronic channels to communicate with investors and manage corporate governance matters.

Average Trading Volume: 1,481,363

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$13.01M

data.title: Klaveness Combination Carriers Lifts Profits and Dividend as Flexible Fleet Outperforms Tanker Market
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Klaveness Combination Carriers AS ( (DE:36K) ) has shared an update.

Klaveness Combination Carriers reported first-quarter 2026 EBITDA of USD 29.3 million and profit after tax of USD 15.6 million, up 30% and 51% quarter-on-quarter, driven by higher CLEANBU earnings and more on-hire days. The company lifted its quarterly dividend to USD 0.25 per share, delivered two new CABU newbuilds, secured a long caustic soda COA into Brazil and a two-year CLEANBU time charter, and expects even stronger second-quarter results as its flexible fleet capitalizes on tight product tanker markets despite disruption from the Middle East conflict.

KCC’s fleet achieved its highest TCE earnings since 2024 and outperformed standard MR and LR1 tankers, underpinning robust ROE and ROCE metrics, though increased tanker deployment and longer ballast legs pushed carbon intensity higher. Management stresses crew safety amid a CABU vessel trapped in the Middle East Gulf while guiding for strong Q2 TCE levels for both CABU and CLEANBU fleets, highlighting the company’s resilience and enhanced earnings power in structurally buoyant tanker and healthy dry bulk markets.

More about Klaveness Combination Carriers AS

Klaveness Combination Carriers ASA is a Norwegian shipping company that owns and operates a fleet of CABU and CLEANBU combination carriers, designed to transport both wet and dry bulk cargoes. By efficiently combining trades and minimizing ballast, its vessels target significantly lower CO2 emissions per transported ton than conventional tanker and dry bulk ships, focusing on global industrial and energy cargo flows.

Average Trading Volume: 81,019

Current Market Cap: NOK5.69B

data.title: Associate Global Partners Director Boosts ETF Holding via Dividend Reinvestment
data.description:

Contango Asset Management Ltd. ( (AU:APL) ) has issued an update.

Associate Global Partners Limited has disclosed a change in the indirect holdings of director Jason Craig Billings, reflecting activity in one of the company’s managed investment products rather than a shift in his direct shareholding. Billings holds his interest through Jasbaat Super Pty Ltd, where he is both a director and shareholder, highlighting ongoing alignment between the company’s leadership and its investment vehicles.

The filing shows Billings received an additional 131 units in the WCM Quality Global Growth Fund Active ETF via that fund’s dividend reinvestment plan, bringing his holding in the ETF to 10,231 units while his stake in the company’s fully paid ordinary shares and in the Muzinich BDC Income Fund Active ETF remained unchanged. The transaction, executed at $9.4298 per unit and outside a closed trading period, underscores continued use of reinvestment features within Associate Global Partners’ product suite without signaling any broader change in director confidence or governance posture.

More about Contango Asset Management Ltd.

Associate Global Partners Limited is an Australian-listed investment management group that offers access to a range of funds and exchange-traded products. Its platform includes actively managed strategies such as the WCM Quality Global Growth Fund Active ETF and the Muzinich BDC Income Fund Active ETF, catering to investors seeking diversified global equity and income exposures.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Tokyo Gas Profit Triples and Dividend Rises Despite Lower Earnings Outlook
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TOKYO GAS Co ( (JP:9531) ) has issued an announcement.

Tokyo Gas reported consolidated net sales of ¥2.83 trillion for the year ended March 31, 2026, up 7.5% year on year, with operating profit surging 48.5% to ¥197.7 billion and profit attributable to owners of the parent jumping 205.8% to ¥226.9 billion. Earnings per share rose to ¥654.76, while the equity ratio dipped slightly to 44.1% and year-end cash and cash equivalents fell to ¥187.0 billion amid strong operating cash flow and sizable investing and financing outflows.

The company raised its annual dividend to ¥110 per share for FY2026 from ¥80 a year earlier and forecasts a further increase to ¥120 in FY2027, even as it guides to a 39.6% decline in profit attributable to owners of the parent and modest 4.0% sales growth next fiscal year. Tokyo Gas also continued to reshape its portfolio, reducing total issued shares and adjusting its consolidation scope by excluding two overseas-related entities and increasing the number of consolidated subsidiaries and equity-method affiliates, signaling ongoing capital and business structure optimization.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9531) stock is a Hold with a Yen5440.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TOKYO GAS Co stock, see the JP:9531 Stock Forecast page.

More about TOKYO GAS Co

Tokyo Gas Co., Ltd. is a major Japanese energy utility listed on the Tokyo and Nagoya stock exchanges, primarily supplying city gas and related energy services. The company also engages in electricity, overseas energy projects and trading, positioning itself as a comprehensive energy provider serving households, businesses and industrial users in Japan and abroad.

Average Trading Volume: 1,250,656

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen2152.5B

data.title: Dear Life acquires leased income property in central Tokyo
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Dear Life Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3245) ).

Dear Life Co., Ltd. has acquired a new income-producing property, tentatively named DeLCCS Suitengu-mae, located in Nihonbashi-Kakigaracho in Tokyo’s Chuo Ward, a short walk from several Tokyo Metro stations. The seven-story reinforced concrete building, with a floor area of about 1,199 square meters, is designed for clinic and condominium use and was financed through a mix of internal funds and bank borrowings.

The seller’s identity and purchase price were not disclosed due to a confidentiality agreement, though the company noted no special capital or business relationship with the seller. As the property is already leased, Dear Life expects the resulting rental income to have only a minimal impact on consolidated results for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, but indicated it will disclose any material change in its earnings outlook if one emerges.

More about Dear Life Co., Ltd.

Dear Life Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based real estate company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 3245. The company focuses on acquiring, developing, and managing income-producing properties, particularly residential and mixed-use assets, to generate stable rental income in urban markets such as central Tokyo.

Average Trading Volume: 277,693

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen50.6B

Weebit Nano Ltd. ( (AU:WBT) ) has shared an update.

Weebit Nano Ltd., a developer and licensor of advanced semiconductor memory technology specializing in ReRAM non-volatile memory for AI, IoT, automotive and other electronics, positions its solutions as faster, cheaper, more reliable and more energy-efficient than traditional flash, while remaining compatible with standard chip fabrication processes.

The company has extended the closing date of its current Share Purchase Plan to 5:00 p.m. AEST on 8 May 2026, giving eligible shareholders extra time to apply for up to A$30,000 of new shares at A$4.05, matching the recent placement price. The revised timetable, which includes new dates for the announcement of results and commencement of normal trading of the new shares, underscores Weebit Nano’s ongoing capital-raising efforts to support its growth and market positioning in advanced memory technologies.

More about Weebit Nano Ltd.

Weebit Nano Ltd. is a leading developer and licensor of advanced semiconductor memory technology, focused on resistive RAM non-volatile memory solutions. Its ReRAM technology targets high-performance, low-power applications across AI, Internet of Things, wearables, automotive, industrial automation, robotics and neuromorphic computing, and is designed for easy integration into existing semiconductor manufacturing flows.

Gryphon Capital Income Trust has reported an unaudited net tangible asset backing of $2.0167 per unit as at the close of trading on 24 April 2026. The figure, described as approximate, gives investors an updated reference point for the value of the trust’s underlying assets.

data.title: Vita Life Sciences to Cancel 658,502 Employee Incentive Shares in Targeted Buy-Back
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Vita Life Sciences Limited ( (AU:VLS) ) just unveiled an update.

Vita Life Sciences will buy back 658,502 unquoted shares issued under its employee Long Term Incentive Plan, following the satisfaction of performance hurdles attached to 875,000 plan shares granted in 2024 to six key executives, including Managing Director Mr. O’Keefe. The buy-back price is set at $2.5323 per share, based on the 10-day volume-weighted average on the ASX, and the repurchased shares will be cancelled with minimal impact on share capital and no effect on cash reserves.

Of the remaining 216,498 plan shares, 66,498 will convert to ordinary shares and be quoted on the ASX for five executives, while an executive holding 150,000 plan shares intends to repay the associated loan by 30 June 2026 so those shares can also become quoted ordinary shares. The move fine-tunes the company’s capital structure while fulfilling obligations under its incentive scheme, aligning executive interests with shareholders without straining liquidity.

More about Vita Life Sciences Limited

Vita Life Sciences Limited operates in the healthcare and life sciences sector, focusing on nutraceuticals and health products distributed primarily through retail and pharmacy channels in Australia and selected Asian markets. The company targets consumers seeking preventive health solutions and leverages long-term incentive plans to retain and reward key executives.

Average Trading Volume: 19,565

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$140.3M
